residue_numbering: 1-indexed positions in the 501-aa ProteinGym target sequence
source: GH1 beta-glycosidase catalytic-residue pattern mapped onto the ProteinGym Q59976_STRSQ target sequence.
evidence: CAZypedia GH1 describes retaining GH1 enzymes with known active-site residues, including a general acid/base glutamate in a typical NEP sequence and a catalytic nucleophile glutamate in a YITENG-like motif. In Q59976_STRSQ, these motifs map to Glu178 and Glu383. The ProteinGym AF2 structure data/proteingym/structures/Q59976_STRSQ.pdb uses chain A with matching 1-501 residue numbering, so these exact positions can also seed a structure-derived active-site shell.
